name: IdsDmMbrAccumulatorsDel

text.value: WITH cte_businesslogic AS (SELECT CAST(@{pipeline().parameters.RunCycle} AS INT) AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO) DELETE FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ClmMartOwner}.MBRSH_DM_FMLY_ACCUM_DEDCT WHERE LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO <> (SELECT LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO FROM cte_businesslogic); DELETE FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ClmMartOwner}.MBRSH_DM_MBR_ACCUM_DEDCT WHERE LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO <> (SELECT LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO FROM cte_businesslogic);

Description:
MODIFICATIONS:
              Brent Leland   03/28/2006 - Originally programmed.
              Brent Leland   04/28/2006 -  Added CLM_DM_CLM_LN_PROC_CD_MOD table.
              O. Nielsen       05/25/2006 - Changed Delete SQL to use Full Table name rather than an Alias - SQL server choked trying to delete from an Alias



Archana Palivela  08/07/2013             Original Programming                                 5114                            IntegrateWrhsDevl
                                                                            (Server to Parallel Conversion)

Annotations:
The Facets->IDS jobs do a full replace each time on the IDS tables eliminating the need for a followup process that will delete the obsolete records.  

The IDS->Datatmart extraction jobs insert/update the datamart tables and the the obsolete data needs to be removed.  
Therefore, delete any records from the tables that are tied to a previous DataMart Run Cycle.
Datamart Member Accumulator  Delete
Run Delete for MBRSH_DM_FMLY_ACCUM_DEDCT
Row Generator will be used to drive the Transformer
Add Defaults and Null Handling.
Run Delete for MBRSH_DM_MBR_ACCUM_DEDCT
